info.name: Prime Energy Demo
info.description: Live demo triggers and reset for Prime Energy Build Tracker presentation

body.raw:
{
  "buildNumber": "PE-0001",
  "testType": "BMS Communication",
  "result": "PASS",
  "notes": "CAN bus issue resolved — all 8 units communicating correctly",
  "technician": "John Koch"
}

request.description: Resolves the BMS FAIL on Midwest Logistics forklift build — shows test result updating live
Lakeside Medical build moves from In Progress to Testing — technician starts QC phase

body.raw:
{
  "buildNumber": "PE-0003",
  "testType": "Capacity Test",
  "result": "FAIL",
  "notes": "Unit 3 showing 84% capacity — below 95% threshold. Isolating cell group.",
  "technician": "John Koch"
}

request.description: Capacity test fails during QC — shows how Prime Energy catches problems before delivery, not after

body.raw:
{
  "buildNumber": "PE-0030",
  "customerName": "Midwest Logistics Center",
  "voltage": "48V",
  "cellConfig": "16S4P — LiFePO4",
  "quantity": 4,
  "application": "Forklift",
  "nominalCapacity": "200Ah",
  "enclosureType": "IP54",
  "targetDelivery": "2026-08-01",
  "notes": "Phase 3 fleet expansion — 4 additional units for new warehouse opening"
}

request.description: Simulates a new customer order arriving — PE-0030 appears live on the dashboard in In Progress status

body.raw:
{
  "lotNumber": "CATL-2026-0312-A",
  "supplier": "CATL",
  "severity": "HIGH",
  "message": "CATL has issued a safety notice for lot CATL-2026-0312-A due to potential BMS communication failure under high-load conditions. All packs using this lot should be inspected before deployment.",
  "actionRequired": "Suspend deployment and schedule cell inspection before next use. Contact Qentropix for inspection protocol."
}

request.description: Fires a recall alert — dashboard auto-detects PE-0001 uses this lot and shows the red banner

item.name: 🔄 Reset
item.description: Fire after the meeting to restore clean demo state

request.description: Wipes all recalls, resets test results and build statuses back to clean seed state. Fire this after every meeting.
